meta.description: 别走那么快，这样会错过沿途的风景的！
meta.author: Damon

posts.title: Android-Jetpack：Compose
posts.text: 一： Gradle配置123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960// Kotlin版本必须为1.4.21及以上plugins { id 'org.jetbrains.kotlin.android' version '1.4.21'}// 配置app的build.gradle// 1，Api版本设置为21或者更高级别// 2，启用compose// 3，设置Kotlin编译器插件版本android { // 1 defaultConfig { minSdkVersion 21 } // 2 buildFeatures { compose true } ... // Set both the Java and Kotlin compilers to target Java 8. compileOptions { sourceCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8 targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8 } kotlinOptions { jvmTarget = "1.8" useIR = true } // 3 composeOptions { kotlinCompilerVersion '1.4.21' kotlinCompilerExtensionVersion '1.0.0-alpha10' }}// 添加配置依赖包dependencies { implementation 'androidx.compose.ui:ui:1.0.0-alpha10' // 工具支持 (Previews, etc.) implementation 'androidx.compose.ui:ui-tooling:1.0.0-alpha10' // 基础组件 (Border, Background, Box, Image, Scroll, shapes, animations, etc.) implementation 'androidx.compose.foundation:foundation:1.0.0-alpha10' // MD风格 implementation 'androidx.compose.material:material:1.0.0-alpha10' // MD风格图示 implementation 'androidx.compose.material:material-icons-core:1.0.0-alpha10' implementation 'androidx.compose.material:material-icons-extended:1.0.0-alpha10' // 可观察数据 implementation 'androidx.compose.runtime:runtime-livedata:1.0.0-alpha10' implementation 'androidx.compose.runtime:runtime-rxjava2:1.0.0-alpha10' // UI测试 androidTestImplementation 'androidx.compose.ui:ui-test-junit4:1.0.0-alpha10'} 二：基础使用组件使用： 定义可组合函数（使用@Composable） 1234@Composablefun Screen(){ } 显示文本 1234567891011@Composablefun MyText() { var typography = MaterialTheme.typography Text( style = typography.h6, // MD风格文本 maxLines = 2, // 长度上限设置为 2 行 overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis, // 自动截短 text = "A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018")} 显示列表 12345678@Composablefun MyTextColumn() { Column { Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} 显示图片 contentScale = ContentScale.Crop ： 设置图片显示模式 123456789101112@Composablefun MyImageWithMidifier() { val painterResource = painterResource(id = R.drawable.ic_launcher_background) Image( modifier = Modifier .height(200.dp) .width(200.dp), painter = painterResource, contentDescription = null, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop )} 显示分割线 1Spacer(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().height(10.dp)) 组件修饰：使用modifier对组件进行修饰 Padding 12345678@Composablefun MyTextColumnWithMidifier() { Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)) { Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} fillMaxWidth()/fillMaxHeight() width()/height() clip：裁剪 三：自定义控件基础绘制 画布 1234Canvas(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) { val canvasWidth = size.width val canvasHeight = size.height} 画线 123456drawLine( start = Offset(x=canvasWidth, y = 0f), end = Offset(x = 0f, y = canvasHeight), color = Color.Blue, strokeWidth = 5F) 画圆 12345drawCircle( color = Color.Blue, center = Offset(x = canvasWidth / 2, y = canvasHeight / 2), radius = size.minDimension / 4) 画矩形 12345val canvasQuadrantSize = size / 2FdrawRect( color = Color.Green, size = canvasQuadrantSize) 基础绘制-常用操作 insert：绘制的内容垂直偏移量和水平偏移量 123inset(50F, 30F) { // 需要绘制的内容} rotate：旋转 123rotate(degrees = 45F){ // 需要绘制的内容} withTransform：多变化统一变换 12345678910withTransform({ translate(left = canvasWidth/5F) rotate(degrees=45F)}) { drawRect( color = Color.Gray, topLeft = Offset(x = canvasWidth / 3F, y = canvasHeight / 3F), size = canvasSize / 3F )} 四：动画 AnimatedVisibility：可见不可见动画 animateContentSize：内容修改动画 Crossfade： animate*AsState 123456789101112131415@Composablefun MyView(){ Canvas(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) { val canvasWidth = size.width val canvasHeight = size.height drawLine( start = Offset(x=canvasWidth, y = 0f), end = Offset(x = 0f, y = canvasHeight), color = Color.Blue, strokeWidth = 5F ) }} 常用内置界面 内置Compose 功能 Surface 添加背景色 Button 按钮 Text 文本 Column 垂直放置项目 ScrollableColumn 可滚动垂直放置项目，== ScrollView LazyColumn 可滚动垂直放置项目，== RecycleView，惰性加载 Divider 分割线 Row 水平放置项目 TopAppBar 顶部导航栏 Scaffold 允许您使用基本的Material Design布局结构来实现UI 常用的功能 内置功能 功能 remember 可变状态 mutableStateOf 可组合可变存储器函数 animateColorAsState 动画 基础：第一课：可组合函数 只需要将 @Composable 添加到函数名称中即可创建可组合函数 添加 @Preview 即可预览函数，注意要加在不带参数的可组合函数中 定义可组合函数 123456789101112131415class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity() { override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) { super.onCreate(savedInstanceState) setContent { // 调用可组合函数 Greeting("Android") } }}// 定义可组合函数@Composablefun Greeting(name: String) { Text (text = "Hello $name!")} 第二课：布局Column：可垂直堆叠元素 1234567891011121314151617class MainActivity : AppCompatActivity() { override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) { super.onCreate(savedInstanceState) setContent { NewsStory() } }}@Composablefun NewsStory() { Column { Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} Column：使用 Modifier 添加样式，可配置尺寸和位置，以及排列方式 12345678910@Composablefun NewsStory() { Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} Column：添加图片 12345678910111213141516@Composablefun NewsStory() { // 从资源文件夹中获取图片 val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { // 设置图片 Image(image) Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} Column：修改图片样式 12345678910111213141516171819@Composablefun NewsStory() { val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { val imageModifier = Modifier .preferredHeight(180.dp) // 指定图片的高度 .fillMaxWidth() // 指定图片的宽度可以填充所属布局 Image(image, modifier = imageModifier, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop) // 指定图片填充Column整个宽度，根据需要裁剪为适当的高度 Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} Column：添加Spacer分割线，将图片和标题分开 123456789101112131415161718192021@Composablefun NewsStory() { val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { val imageModifier = Modifier .preferredHeight(180.dp) .fillMaxWidth() Image(image, modifier = imageModifier, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop) // 添加分割线 Spacer(Modifier.preferredHeight(16.dp)) Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} 第三课：Material Design主要关键要素： Shape 123456789101112131415161718192021@Composablefun NewsStory() { val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { val imageModifier = Modifier .preferredHeight(180.dp) .fillMaxWidth() .clip(shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)) // 设置圆角裁切 Image(image, modifier = imageModifier, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop) Spacer(Modifier.preferredHeight(16.dp)) Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove") Text("Davenport, California") Text("December 2018") }} 使用Material主题设置文本样式 MaterialTheme.typography 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728@Composablefun NewsStory() { val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) MaterialTheme { // 获取Material的默认文本样式 val typography = MaterialTheme.typography Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { val imageModifier = Modifier .preferredHeight(180.dp) .fillMaxWidth() .clip(shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)) Image(image, modifier = imageModifier, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop) Spacer(Modifier.preferredHeight(16.dp)) Text("A day in Shark Fin Cove", style = typography.h6) // 设置文本样式 Text("Davenport, California", style = typography.body2) Text("December 2018", style = typography.body2) } }} 如果标题文本过长则进行截断配置 属性设置 maxLines overflow 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132@Composablefun NewsStory() { val image = imageResource(R.drawable.header) MaterialTheme { val typography = MaterialTheme.typography Column( modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp) ) { val imageModifier = Modifier .preferredHeight(180.dp) .fillMaxWidth() .clip(shape = RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)) Image(image, modifier = imageModifier, contentScale = ContentScale.Crop) Spacer(Modifier.preferredHeight(16.dp)) Text( "A day wandering through the sandhills " + "in Shark Fin Cove, and a few of the " + "sights I saw", style = typography.h6, maxLines = 2, // 设置文本2行 overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis) // 设置文本超出部分后面...显示 Text("Davenport, California", style = typography.body2) Text("December 2018", style = typography.body2) } }} State初步使用Compose UI的数据变化通过可观察状态来实现，常用的有State, LiveData, StateFlow, Flow, Observable ViewModel+LiveData+Activity 1234567891011121314151617181920class HelloViewModel: ViewModel(){ private val _name = MutableLiveData("") val name: LiveData<String> = _name fun onNameChanged(newName: String){ _name.value = newName }}class HelloActivity: AppCompatActivity(){ val helloViewModel by viewModels<HelloViewModel>() override fun onCreate(saveInstanceState: Bundle?){ super.onCreate(saveInstanceState) binding.textInput.doAfterTextChanged{ helloViewModel.onNameChanged(it.toString) } helloViewModel.name.observe(this){ name -> binding.helloText.text = "Hello, $name" } }} ViewModel + Compose + Activity observeAsState 可观察 LiveData<T> 并返回 State 对象，每当 LiveData 发生变化时，该对象都会更新。State<T> 是 Jetpack Compose 可以直接使用的可观察类型 12345678910111213141516171819202122class HelloViewModel: ViewModel(){ private val _name = MutableLiveData("") val name: LiveData<String> = _name fun onNameChanged(newName: String){ _name.value = newName }}@Composablefun HelloScreen(helloViewModel: HelloViewModel = viewModel()){ // 使用委托属性by隐式将State<T>视为类型T的对象 // val nameState: State<String> = helloViewModel.name.observeAsState("") val name: String by helloViewModel.name.onserveAsState("") Column{ Text(text = name) TextField( value = name, onValueChange = {helloViewModel.onNameChanged(it)}, label = {Text("Name")} ) }} 可组合项的状态使用remember在可组合项中创建内部状态 添加状态 1234567// 在可组合项中声明MutableState对象的方法有三种var mutableState = remember { mutableStateOf(default) }var value by remember { mutableStateOf(default) }val (value, setValue) = remember{ mutableStateOf(default) }// 注意// = 跟 by 是不同的 其他状态Jetpack Compose 并不要求您使用MutableState<T>存储状态，Jetpack Compose支持其它可观察类型，不过在读取其它可观察类型之前，需要转换成State<T>，才能在发生状态变化时自动重组界面，其它可观察类型如下： LiveData Flow RxJava2 注意：可变对象（ArrayList或者mutableListOf()）可能会导致看到不正确的数据，不可变数据不能由Compose观察，因为发生变化时不能进行重组，需要使用可观察的存储器（State<List>）和不可变的listOf() 注意事项1，在组合中被remember记住的值在配置更改（如旋转）的时候会被忘记并重新创建，可以改用保存的实例状态，在配置更改的时候自动保存和恢复状态 savedInstanceState 可组合函数 savedInstanceState 会返回MutableState，它会在配置更改时自动保存和恢复自身 1234567891011@Composablefun ExpandingCard(title: String, body: String) { var expanded by savedInstanceState { false } ExpandingCard( title = title, body = body, expanded = expanded, onExpand = { expanded = true }, onCollapse = { expanded = false } )} ​
